name: RC Harris Water Treatment Center
permits: Not needed for photography; required for vehicle access to curved road
idealIf: You want cinematic, romantic imagery blending architecture with waterfront scenery and don't mind walking and wind.

name: Toronto Music Garden
vibe: Whimsical, romantic, natural, garden + city mix
permits: Not needed for photos; required for civil ceremony bookings
idealIf: You prefer romantic garden aesthetics while staying downtown. Comfortable with weekend crowds.

name: Guild Park & Gardens
permits: Not required for engagement shoots or general photography
idealIf: You want elegant, cinematic destination-feel imagery without leaving the city.

name: Scarborough Bluffs
vibe: Dramatic, coastal, wide-open, 'out of the city' feel
idealIf: You want destination beach and cliff aesthetics without leaving Toronto. Comfortable with crowds and hiking.

name: University of Toronto
walkingNote: Multiple courtyards and buildings to explore
permits: Some indoor and restricted areas require permission
idealIf: You want classic, elegant European-influenced photos right in downtown Toronto with diverse backdrops.

name: TD Dominion Centre / King St
idealIf: You prefer sleek, urban, downtown modern aesthetics over nature-focused styles.
